characters.name: Rox Adams
characters.description: Rox AdamsProfessional infoOccupationPolice officerBehind the scenesAppears inEpisode 112527 April2019Portrayed byKatie WestCasualtyappearances33Rox Adamsis a police officer who resides inHolby. In April 2019, on her way to a house call, Rox received a tip-off fromMilford Warehouse, and, despite knowing that there was a covert surveillance mission being undertaken there, she went to investigate. When she found a group of men unresponsive inside, she called for an ambulance. Call handlerIain Deananswered her call and talked her through checking the men for any signs of breathing or blood loss. With his help, Rox managed to perform CPR on one of the men and, as the floor was littered with drugs, she went to find a fridge with a naloxone kit. However, Rox started coughing and pointed out that the men's lips were red. Iain ordered her to get out of the building as he believed that the men were victims of carbon monoxide poisoning.

characters.name: Lucas Anderson
characters.description: Lucas AndersonFamilyParentsSean AndersonJessica HarrisonOther relativesAmelia Anderson(sister)Harry Trueman(half-brother)Behind the scenesFirst appearance"Walk the Line"19 April2008Last appearance"An Ugly Truth"6 February2010Portrayed byDanny EmesCasualtyappearances22•23•24Lucas Andersonis the son ofJessica HarrisonandSean Anderson. He is hit by a car after his childminder fails to pick him up from school. The childminder attempts to ring his parents but bothSeanandJessicaare too busy with their respective lovers. Although Lucas recovers Jess takes the accident as being karma for her relationship withAdamand ends things with him. (CAS:"Paradise Lost").

characters.name: Shai Anderton
characters.description: Shai AndertonBiographical infoBorn1994/1995 (age 30–31)FamilyChildrenUnborn childProfessional infoOccupationStreet food vendorBehind the scenesAppears inEpisode 11291 June2019Portrayed bySimone AshleyCasualtyappearances33Shai Anderton(born 1994/1995) is a vegan street food vendor who lives inHolby. 1994/1995 (age 30–31) On 1 June 2019, Shai tried to tell her boyfriendJarrod Morranthat she had missed three periods, but he was distracted by his boyfriendTejandelivering the wrong batch of bread. Whilst working, she told Jarrod the news, but she became irritated by his nonchalant response to it and asserted that she sometimes did not want her relationship with him and Tejan. Shortly after, the stove in their stall ignited and exploded.

characters.name: Jez Andrews
characters.description: Jez AndrewsBiographical infoFull nameJeremy AndrewsBornMarch-December 1993 (age 32–33)Professional infoOccupationParamedic(2016-)Place of workHolby Ambulance Service(2016-17)Behind the scenesFirst appearance"High Tide"12 March2016Last appearanceEpisode 105026 August2017Portrayed byLloyd EverittCasualtyappearances30•31•32Holby Cityappearances18Jeremy"Jez"Andrews(born March-December 1993)[1]is aparamedicwho worked for theHolby Ambulance Service. He landed his first job as a paramedic with the ambulance service in March 2016, a month after qualifying. He left the following year to go travelling. March-December 1993 (age 32–33) Within months of arriving in Holby, Jez struck a friendship with paramedic colleagueIain Dean. Shortly after his arrival, he installed a basketball hoop in the ambulance station, something which members of ED staff frequently made use of. Although Jez was always up for a laugh, he was also willing to go a long way to ensure the best care when dealing with patients. He left the service in August 2017 withMickey Ellissonto go travelling.

characters.name: Beth Archer
characters.description: Beth ArcherFamilySpouseKenny ArcherBehind the scenesFirst appearance"Survivor's Guilt"8 March2014Last appearance"Gravity"15 March2014Portrayed byRachel ElizabethCasualtyappearances28Beth Archeris the husband ofKenny Archer,Iain Dean's old army colleague. In March 2014, she took a break inHolbywith Kenny in a B&B, but a fire broke out and she burned her hands trying to extinguish it. Iain was called to bring her back to the ED and Kenny later started to get suspicious that Beth and Iain were having an affair. When they returned to the B&B Kenny confronted her about the missed calls and messages on her phone from him and he went to the ambulance station and kept Iain andBig Machostage. Once Kenny had been apprehended, Beth went to apologise to Iain and they said goodbye to one another.

characters.name: Beth Archer
characters.description: Beth ArcherFamilySpouseKenny ArcherBehind the scenesFirst appearance"Survivor's Guilt"8 March2014Last appearance"Gravity"15 March2014Portrayed byRachel ElizabethCasualtyappearances28Beth Archeris the husband ofKenny Archer,Iain Dean's old army colleague. characters.name: Kenny Archer
characters.description: Kenny ArcherBiographical infoFull nameKenneth ArcherFamilySpouseBeth ArcherProfessional infoOccupationSoldier (before 2014)Behind the scenesFirst appearance"Survivor's Guilt"8 March2014Last appearance"Gravity"15 March2014Portrayed byJames WallworkCasualtyappearances28Kenneth"Kenny"Archeris an ex army colleague ofIain DeanandSam Nicholls. In March 2014, Iain andBig Macwere called out to a hotel following a burns injury, and they were greeted by Kenny and his wifeBeth. However, Kenny soon revealed to Iain that his marriage was under strain, and what was supposed to be a romantic break soon turned dark. He began to have suspicions over his wife, and rampaged the ambulance in search of Iain, and Big Mac and Iain soon found themselves in a hostage situation. Eventually the police were called and Kenny was apprehended.

characters.name: Matilda Ashbie
characters.description: Matilda AshbieBiographical infoBorn(2015-09-23)23 September 2015(age 10)FamilyParentsTaylor AshbieBehind the scenesFirst appearance"Flutterby"17 October2015Last appearance"Estranged"28 November2015Casualtyappearances30Matlida Ashbie(born 23 September 2015) is the baby daughter ofTaylor Ashbie. Until December 2015,Caleb Knightwas under the impression that he was her biological father but paternity tests proved that he wasn't. (2015-09-23)23 September 2015(age 10) In October 2015 after escaping from prison, Taylor returned to theEDto introduce Cal to a baby who she claims is his daughter, whom she had given birth to in prison. Although Taylor said they would do it together seriously this time, she waited for Cal to fall asleep and ran off again like she had done earlier in the year.

(2015-09-23)23 September 2015(age 10) In October 2015 after escaping from prison, Taylor returned to theEDto introduce Cal to a baby who she claims is his daughter, whom she had given birth to in prison. Although Taylor said they would do it together seriously this time, she waited for Cal to fall asleep and ran off again like she had done earlier in the year.

characters.name: Taylor Ashbie
characters.description: Taylor AshbieFamilyPartnerCaleb Knight(2014-15)ChildrenMatilda(b.2015)Professional infoOccupationCon artistBehind the scenesFirst appearance"Feeling Good"6 December2014Last appearance"Rules of Attraction"10 October2015Portrayed bySarah Jayne DunnCasualtyappearances29•30Taylor Ashbieis a con artist and former girlfriend ofCaleb Knight. After meeting Cal, she made up the story that she was part of a charity organisation, and that they were in need of additional funding. When she asked him for £15,000, he stole it fromEthanand gave it to her so he wouldn't lose her. Taylor then ran off with the money, but she called Cal about a month later as she had been stabbed and was in the toilets in a park. After treating her, Ethan made a deal with her that she would run away from Cal as a result of what she had done. When she did get out of the car at the arranged time at the traffic lights, Cal ran after her but Ethan managed to stop him, and after realising that it was Ethan who told Taylor to leave, they broke into an argument. In October 2015, Taylor returned to the ED having escaped from prison after giving birth to ababy girlwhom she believed was Cal's. After Ethan and Cal treat her for an infection secretly in the on call room, Cal convinces her to turn herself in and then when she's released the three of them can be together. However, when Cal falls asleep next to the baby and Taylor, he wakes up to find Taylor missing, and a note saying that it is better this way, indicating she has once again gone on the run. In December, Cal took a paternity test and discovered that Matilda wasn't his, and handed her over to social services.

characters.name: Miles Ashworth
characters.description: Miles AshworthBiographical infoFull nameMiles Kane AshworthBorn(2000-10-01)October 1, 2000(age 25)FamilyParentsRoger AshworthLinda AshworthBehind the scenesFirst appearanceEpisode 10649 December2017Last appearanceEpisode 107110 February2018Portrayed byFinney CassidyCasualtyappearances32Miles Kane Ashworth(born 1 October 2000) is a resident ofHolby. He is a former friend ofBlake Gardner. (2000-10-01)October 1, 2000(age 25) In December 2017, Blake ditched school to drink at Miles' house with a few other friends. When they ran out of vodka, they convinced Blake to rob an off-licence. When Blake followed through and got injured in the process, they taunted him and drove away. Later, after Blake was treated, Miles and his friends picked him up from theEDto go to a party. (CAS:Episode 1064)

characters.name: Julie Barry
characters.description: Julie BarryFamilyChildrenTwoBehind the scenesAppears inEpisode 112420 April2019Portrayed byRosie MaddisonCasualtyappearances33Julie Barryis a woman who resides inHolby. Julie grew up in care, and, at the age of 15, she met a man who manipulated her. This led her to become addicted to opiates and illegal drugs, and he also physically abused her. Julie had two children with him, and they were subsequently taken into care. At some point, she started self-harming. In April 2019, Julie and her lawyerMina Bartramarrived late to a hearing atEdwalton Courthouse, and Mina explained to thejudgethat Julie was ready to fight for custody of her children. However, the courts decided to issue a temporary care order to her children's foster parents as Mina had given her internShona Collinsthe wrong notes. (CAS:Episode 1124)

characters.description: Mina BartramBiographical infoBorn1984/1985 (age 41–42)Professional infoOccupationLawyerBehind the scenesAppears inEpisode 112420 April2019Portrayed byZora BishopCasualtyappearances33Mina Bartram(born 1984/1985) is a lawyer who resides inHolby. 1984/1985 (age 41–42) In 2016, Mina fractured his right ankle in a skiing accident and was taken toHolby City Hospital'semergency departmentfor treatment. She was prescribed co-codamol to help deal with the pain, but, once the prescription finished, she bought more elsewhere. (CAS:Episode 1124)

characters.description: Tamzin BayleBiographical infoBorn7 AugustProfessional infoOccupationParamedicBehind the scenesFirst appearance"Partners"13 August2011Last appearance"The Last Call"11 October2014Portrayed byGemma AtkinsonCasualtyappearances26•27•28•29Tamzin Bayle(born 7 August) is aparamedicwho worked for theHolby Ambulance Servicefrom 2011 to 2014. 7 August Upon her arrival, Tamzin immediately gets off on the wrong foot when she accidentally breaks fellow paramedic, Jeff Collier's beloved A-Team mug and the pair later put Jeff's nose out of joint when they steal their "shout". Following Omar's disagreement with Jeff about putting targets before patients, Omar is asked to leave. Tamzin decides to stick with Omar and they leave Holby City Hospital.

characters.name: Grace Beauchamp-Strachan
characters.description: Grace Beauchamp-StrachanBiographical infoFull nameGrace Beauchamp-StrachanBorn1 May2007[1]Holby City Hospital,Holby, Wyvern, UKFamilyParentsSam StrachanConnie BeauchampSiblingsKieron Patel(paternal half-brother)GrandparentsAudrey Strachan(paternal grandmother)William Chase(maternal grandfather)Behind the scenesFirst appearance"Deep Dark Truthful Mirror"1 May2007Last appearanceEpisode 11943 April2021Portrayed byEmily CareyCasualtyappearances29•30•31•32•35Holby Cityappearances9•10•11•12•13Grace Beauchamp-Strachan(born1 May2007) is the daughter ofConnie BeauchampandSam Strachan. Connie originally took care of Grace until 2015 when she moved to New York to live with her father. However, she returned with him in 2016 when he was in the UK at a conference involving cardiothoracics. Grace formerly attended Holby Grammar School. 1 May2007[1]Holby City Hospital,Holby, Wyvern, UK Despite being demanding of her mother's attention, it's simply a result of Connie prioritising her career. In August 2016 Grace was involved in a severe car crash which left her in a coma for six weeks. Her recovery took around a year, and she was able to walk unaided by July the following year. A month after this, she returned to the US with Sam unknown to Connie.

characters.name: Hailey Blake
characters.description: Hailey BlakeFamilyParentsTimothy BlakeBehind the scenesFirst appearance"The Index Case"25 October2014Last appearance"Muddling Through"17 January2015Portrayed byKaty CarmichaelCasualtyappearances29Hailey Blakeis the daughter of Timothy Blake, a patient who died in theEDwhilst under the care ofConnie Beauchamp. Timothy was being abused by his wife, Paula, but Hailey suspected Connie was to blame for not picking up on the signs. Connie had a complaint lodged against her by Hailey in October 2014. Despite trying to reason with her, it seemed to only make things worse for Connie. After a lengthy ordeal for both Connie and Hailey, they had a conversation outside the ED in early January and she decided not to take the case any further. Katy Carmichaelportrayed Hailey Blake onCasualtyin 2014 and 2015. In total, she appeared in five episodes.

characters.name: Hugo Bonning
characters.description: Hugo BonningBiographical infoBorn2004/2005 (age 20–21)FamilyParentsJim BonningBehind the scenesFirst appearance"About My Mother"19 November2016Last appearance"End of the Road"20 May2017Portrayed byBilly AngelCasualtyappearances31Hugo Bonning(born 2004/2005) is a friend ofGrace Beauchamp. He was admitted to theEDin November 2016 after falling off the back of a lorry. 2004/2005 (age 20–21) In November 2016 whilst trying to get a ride, Hugo clung onto the underneath of a lorry. However, he soon lost his grip and was brought into the ED byIainandJezwho were luckily driving behind the lorry when Hugo let go. Hugo's injuries later proved to be worse than expected, but just as they found out Hugo caught sight of Grace coming out of the hospital lift in a wheelchair. Angry that Connie had told him that Grace was okay, he ran off and got on a bus. Connie pursued the bus on her motorbike, eventually forcing it to stop and getting Hugo to safety. (CAS: "About My Mother")
